div.p: Storage Invariant Atomic read ensures either complete snapshot or none at all.
Interface Call RestoreSnapshot(data) called with snapshot Data field.
Index Invariant All indices set to at least lastIncludedIndex.
Truncation Rule Log contains only entries AFTER lastIncludedIndex.
Consistency Sequential application from lastIncludedIndex+1 to commitIndex.
Availability Node rejoins cluster with consistent application state.

g.text: 1. Snapshot persisted BEFORE log truncation (atomic guarantee)
2. Log entries exist only for indices > lastIncludedIndex
4. CommitIndex persistence ensures no committed data is lost
